title: vancasso SIMI Mugs Set, 12oz/360ml Porcelain Coffee Mug Set of 6, Bohemian Style Tea and Coffee Cups with Handle, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Suitable for All Kinds of Drinks
features: 【Impressive Boho Style】vancasso simi mugs set is creatively crafted from ceramic into unique and contemporary shapes, beautifully colored in stunning colours, delicately patterned with boast enchanting and intricate flora.The lively colors and artistic patterns evoke a sense of joy and positivity, enhancing your dining experience with a burst of energy and happiness

【Versatile functions】 approx. 8.6 x 8.6 x H 10.2 cm, 360 ml. Our coffee mug set is perfect for serving coffee, cappuccino, latte macchiato, cocoa, tea, milk, cold and hot drinks and etc. The unique colourful mood of colours simply reminds you of elegant magnificent flowers and countable hopeful spring

【Safe & Healthy】Made of LEAD & CADMIUM-FREE healthy porcelain, NON-TOXIC and ECO-FRIENDLY. The ceramic has a high level of mechanical resistance, low porosity and high density. Will no any chemical reaction with the food, and won’t transfer odors, colors or flavors between uses

【Solid & Durable】After the1300-1400℃ high temperature glaze burning, the cups are enough strong to withstand the heat of a microwave oven but won’t get very hot and can survive from the everyday dishwasher's use. The good insulation of the coffee mug ensures that your coffee or drinks do not cool so quickly

【Phenomenal After-Sale Care】If the item you received couldn't up to your standard, please feel free to contact us, we will arrange the replacement to ensure you get high quality porducts you paid for. We are also happy to issue the refund if it's requested, we promise we won't let our customer suffer any loss
description: Product Description Artistic Flair on Every Dinnerware: Unleash Your Creativity with SIMI The design concept of the "SIMI" series aims for timeless beauty that transcends trends. Its artistic and bohemian charm is intended to be cherished for generations, becoming an enduring symbol of freedom, love, and self-expression With every meal served on the "SIMI" dinnerware, a little bit bohemian spirit was shared, spreading joy and inspiration. Each dinnerware became a canvas for life's experiences, making every dining occasion a vibrant celebration of the human experience The video showcases the product in use. Aesthetically Original vancasso simi mugs set is creatively crafted from ceramic into unique and contemporary shapes, beautifully colored in stunning colours, delicately patterned with boast enchanting and intricate flora. Safe & Healthy Stoneware The dinnerware sets are made from Premium NON-LEAD and NON-CADMIUM ceramic, NON-TOXIC. The surface is solid and dense, will not be any chemical reaction with the food. Perfectly compatible with cold & hot food without worry about chips, nicks, cracks, and scratches.
